description: Maps source fields containing monetary values to the Amount concept (MonetaryAmount). Every rule must specify frequency and (where applicable) gross/net context, because the same numeric value means different things across sources.

rules.rationale: FK pays Aktivitetsstöd as monthly utbetalningar. net_sek is the amount the citizen actually receives after tax withholding. Each row is one monthly payment, so summing all rows for a person yields the total received during the period.
FK records the gross monthly amount before tax withholding (per Tabell 55+56 in SSBTEK v11).

Per current synthetic data, the value stored represents the gross total for the entire decision period. Once the synthetic generator is corrected to per-period (Periodicitet=1, Monthly), this rule should change to frequency=Month.
CSN denominates approved amounts per ISO week (per Tabell 21). Both GRUNDB (bidrag/grant) and GRUNDL (lån/loan) are reported in this format.
CSN provides a precomputed total per amount type for the approved period. This is what the unified view should display as the headline number for a CSN study aid line.
CSN also reports a combined total at the period level (sum of GRUNDB + GRUNDL). Useful as a cross-check against the per-type totals.
